_comment: Cocktail preparation methods with dilution percentage. dilution_pct is the estimated water added during preparation, used in ABV calculation (Morgenthaler formula). Used by abvCalculator.js.

shake.name: Shake
shake.description: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker

stir.name: Stir
stir.description: Stir with ice in a mixing glass

build.name: Build
build.description: Build directly in the serving glass over ice

blend.name: Blend
blend.description: Blend with ice in an electric blender

muddle.name: Muddle
muddle.description: Muddle ingredients to release oils and juices

layer.name: Layer
layer.description: Float ingredients in layers using a bar spoon

dry_shake.name: Dry Shake
dry_shake.description: Shake without ice to emulsify egg white or cream

float.name: Float
float.description: Float an ingredient on top of the drink

throw.name: Throw
throw.description: Pour repeatedly between two vessels to aerate and chill
